_comment: Division 2 Item Database — Minimum Viable Dataset

weapons.name: St. Elmo's Engine
attr3Options: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
weapons.attr3Default: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
weapons.primaryDrop: Targeted Loot: Assault Rifles in Countdown (Heroic)
weapons.shortNote: Reconfigure 3rd attribute to DMG Out of Cover. All mod slots: Critical Hit Damage.

weapons.name: Kingbreaker
attr3Options: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
weapons.attr3Default: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
weapons.primaryDrop: Targeted Loot: Assault Rifles in Countdown (Challenging+)
weapons.shortNote: Roll DMG Out of Cover as 3rd attribute. Talent is permanently locked — never try to change it.

weapons.name: Iron Lung
weapons.core2: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
weapons.primaryDrop: Targeted Loot: LMGs in Grand Washington Hotel (Heroic)
weapons.shortNote: LMG Core2 is always DMG Out of Cover — do not reconfigure to it. Roll Crit Hit Damage as 3rd attribute instead.

weapons.name: Scorpio
attr3Options: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
weapons.primaryDrop: Targeted Loot: Shotguns in Manning National Zoo (Heroic)
weapons.shortNote: One shot applies burn, bleed, blind, and shock. Use with Eclipse Protocol Spread to chain status to entire rooms.

weapons.name: GR9
weapons.core2: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
weapons.shortNote: Use Frenzy or Optimist. Roll Crit Hit Damage on the third attribute because Out of Cover is already built in.

weaponTalents.name: Actum Est
weaponTalents.description: Every 100 hits with this weapon loads the next magazine with shock rounds that stun targets briefly on hit.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Flatline
weaponTalents.description: While above 75% total armor, weapon damage is increased by 25%.

weaponTalents.name: Flatline
weaponTalents.description: While above 75% total armor, weapon damage is increased by 15%.

weaponTalents.name: Frenzy
weaponTalents.description: Reloading from empty grants +25% weapon damage and +25% fire rate for 10 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Iron Lung
weaponTalents.description: Sustained fire builds stacks that increase weapon damage and provide armor repair.

weaponTalents.name: Parasitic
weaponTalents.description: Each shot simultaneously applies burn, bleed, blind, and shock status effects.

chestTalents.name: Press the Advantage
chestTalents.description: Increases the Striker's Gamble stack cap from 100 to 200.

chestTalents.name: Spread
chestTalents.description: When you apply a status effect to an enemy, the effect automatically transfers to all enemies within 8m.

chestTalents.name: Kinetic Momentum
chestTalents.description: While your skills are active, your weapon damage is increased by 15%.

chestTalents.name: Shielded Vigilance
chestTalents.description: Entering cover grants +20% weapon damage for 4 seconds.

chestTalents.name: All for One
chestTalents.description: Increases the maximum number of simultaneously marked enemies from 4 to 8.

backpackTalents.name: Risk Management
backpackTalents.description: Increases the Striker's Gamble damage bonus per stack from 0.65% to 1% per hit.

backpackTalents.name: Vindictive
backpackTalents.description: When you apply a status effect, all allies within 20m gain +20% weapon damage for 5 seconds.

backpackTalents.name: In-Sync
backpackTalents.description: Shooting while your skills are active grants +35% skill damage for 8 seconds.

backpackTalents.name: Vanguard
backpackTalents.description: Kills grant bonus armor to nearby allies equal to 15% of your max armor.

backpackTalents.name: Memento (Exotic)
backpackTalents.description: Kills grant stacking trophy armor bonus up to +50% of max armor. Stacks decay when not killing.

backpackTalents.name: One for All
backpackTalents.description: Increases the Heartbreaker stack bonus from 3% to 5% weapon damage per kill stack.

backpackTalents.name: Predator
backpackTalents.description: Hit 4 different enemies within 4 seconds to grant all allies +10% Critical Hit Chance for 10 seconds.

backpackTalents.name: Vile
backpackTalents.description: All status-affected enemies take additional damage over time. Best when you keep statuses rolling constantly.

gearSets.name: Striker's Battlegear
gearSets.bonus4pc: Striker's Gamble: +0.65% weapon damage per hit, up to 100 stacks (+65% total). Stacks reset on reload.
gearSets.identity: Sustained fire DPS. Stack hits to scale weapon damage. Reward: aggression and continuous fire.

gearSets.name: Heartbreaker
gearSets.bonus4pc: Hostile Takeover: hitting an enemy marks them. When a marked enemy dies, gain +3% weapon damage and +2% armor (up to 35 stacks). Each contributing ally/skill adds a stack.
gearSets.identity: Kill-chain DPS. Stacks from kills by you AND allies. Best in group content.

gearSets.name: Eclipse Protocol
gearSets.bonus4pc: Spread: status effects auto-transfer to enemies within 8m. Each new status application refreshes duration.
gearSets.identity: AoE status effect machine. One shot statuses an entire room via Spread.

gearSets.name: Negotiator's Dilemma
gearSets.bonus4pc: Hostile Negotiations: critting an enemy marks them. Damage to a marked enemy spreads 60% to all other marked enemies.
gearSets.identity: Crit-chain AoE. Every crit spreads damage to all marked targets simultaneously.

gearSets.name: Refactor
gearSets.bonus4pc: Shooting enemies within 5m of your deployed skills deals +100% bonus damage.
gearSets.identity: Hybrid weapon/skill DPS. Fight near your deployed skills for massive damage bonus.

brandSets.name: Wyvern Wear
brandSets.identity: Primary skill damage brand. Mandatory 2pc for any skill build.

brandSets.name: Hana-U Corporation
brandSets.identity: Skill cooldown and haste. Pairs with Wyvern Wear for max skill uptime.

brandSets.name: Contractor's
brandSets.identity: Clean weapon damage. Used when gear set fills 4 slots and 2 free slots need weapon damage.

brandSets.name: Grupo Sombra S.A.
brandSets.identity: Utility weapon brand. Pairs well with LMG builds for extended fire.

exotics.name: Coyote's Mask
exotics.uniqueEffect: Predator: hit 4 different enemies within 4 seconds to grant all group members +10% critical hit chance for 10 seconds.
exotics.primaryAcquisition: Jefferson Trade Center Stronghold final boss (Challenge+)

exotics.name: Memento
exotics.uniqueEffect: Kills grant stacking trophy armor bonus up to +50% of max armor. Stacks decay when not in a kill chain.

exotics.name: Vile Mask
exotics.uniqueEffect: Vile: All status-affected enemies take stacking poison damage over time. Stacks up to 10 times.

skills.name: Striker Drone
skills.description: Tracks your designated target and deals continuous weapon damage automatically.

skills.name: Assault Turret
skills.description: Deploys a stationary turret that automatically fires at all enemies in range.

skills.name: Reviver Hive
skills.description: Deploys on the ground and auto-revives downed allies within its radius.

skills.name: Chem Launcher (Heal)
skills.description: Fires a canister that explodes with a healing cloud on impact, repairing armor of all allies inside.

skills.name: Chem Launcher (Oxidizer)
skills.description: Fires a canister that explodes with a corrosive cloud, continuously reducing enemy armor.

skills.name: Seeker Mine (Airburst)
skills.description: Rolls toward enemies and detonates with multiple submunitions in a large AoE explosion.
